about.title: Professionalism & Experience
about.p1: We are a specialized engineering team providing the design and approval of road traffic and transport organization schemes in Tbilisi.
about.p2: Our mission is to ensure the safe, compliant, and efficient planning of road infrastructure for both temporary and permanent urban works.
about.agreementsDesc: Every project undergoes full legal and technical validation with the relevant state authorities:
about.gov1Desc: Ministry of Internal Affairs of Georgia
about.gov2Desc: Transport and Urban Development Agency of Tbilisi

services.subtitle: Professional engineering services covering all aspects of road and transport planning.
services.ctaDesc: Contact us today for full legal and technical consultations regarding Patrol Police and Municipal Transport Agency requirements.

list.title: Preparation of Traffic Organization Schemes
list.desc: Complete planning and design of permanent and temporary traffic flows.

list.title: Final Version of Traffic Organization
list.desc: Preparation and approval of the final, permanent traffic organization scheme.

list.title: Temporary Entrance-Exit Traffic Organization Scheme
list.desc: Temporary project for safe vehicle entry and exit at the site.

list.title: Temporary Traffic Scheme during Capital Fence Installation
list.desc: Scheme to ensure traffic safety during perimeter fencing.

list.title: Temporary Traffic Scheme during Construction Fence Installation
list.desc: Project for temporary restrictions required for construction works.

list.title: Temporary Scheme for Construction Equipment Placement
list.desc: Scheme for the safe placement of cranes and other heavy equipment on the road.

list.title: Temporary Schemes for Water, Sewage, Gas, and Electric Cable Installation
list.desc: Temporary road excavation schemes during the installation of engineering utilities.
